zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Clarke於1511年出生在英國薩默塞特時，她的父親William Clarke21歲，母親Frances Brook16歲。她於大約1538年與Alexander Alford在英國薩默塞特特斯陶頓結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1577年12月30日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特特斯陶頓享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特特斯陶頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Clarke于1511年出生在英国薩默塞特时，她的父亲William Clarke21岁，母亲Frances Brook16岁。她于大约1538年与Alexander Alford在英国薩默塞特特斯陶頓结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1577年12月30日在英国英格兰薩默塞特特斯陶頓享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特特斯陶頓。

nameMeanings.name: Clarke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Clark  .

History: This name was brought independently to New England by many bearers from the 17th century onward. Nicholas Clarke was one of the founders of Hartford, CT (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker) in 1635.

variants.name: Clark
meanings: English: from Middle English clerk, clark ‘clerk, cleric, writer’ (Old French clerc; see Clerc ). The original sense was ‘man in a religious order, cleric, clergyman’. As all writing and secretarial work in medieval Christian Europe was normally done by members of the clergy, the term clerk came to mean ‘scholar, secretary, recorder, or penman’ as well as ‘cleric’. As a surname, it was particularly common for one who had taken only minor holy orders. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established.
Irish (Westmeath, Mayo): in Ireland the English surname was frequently adopted, partly by translation for Ó Cléirigh; see Cleary .
Americanized form of Dutch   De Klerk   or Flemish   De Clerck   or of variants of these names, and possibly also of French   Clerc  . Compare   Clerk   2 and   De Clark  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Clarke was born in 1511, in Somerset, England, her father, William Clarke, was 21 and her mother, Frances Brook, was 16. She married Alexander Alford about 1538, in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 30 December 1577, in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Clarke est née en 1511, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, William Clarke, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Frances Brook, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Alford environ 1538, à Whitestaunton, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 décembre 1577, à Whitestaunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Whitestaunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Clarke 1511 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Clarke 21 und ihre Mutter Frances Brook 16. Sie hat um 1538 in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England Alexander Alford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. Dezember 1577 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Clarke è nata il nel 1511 nel Somerset, England, sua padre, William Clarke, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Frances Brook, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Alexander Alford circa 1538, nel Whitestaunton, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 30 dicembre 1577, nel Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Clarkeが1511年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父William Clarkeは21歳，母Frances Brookは16歳であった。約1538年にイギリスソメルセトウィテスタウントンでAlexander Alfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1577年12月30日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウィテスタウントンで66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトウィテスタウントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Clarke(이)가 1511년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Clarke(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Frances Brook(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1538년 영국 서머세트 휘츠타운턴에서 Alexander Alford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1577년 12월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 휘츠타운턴에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 휘츠타운턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Clarke nasceu em 1511, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Clarke, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Frances Brook, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Alford aproximadamente 1538, em Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de dezembro de 1577, em Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Clarke родилась в 1511 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени William Clarke было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Frances Brook, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Alford около 1538 г. в местности уитстаунтон, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 30 декабря 1577 г. в местности уитстаунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности уитстаунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Clarke nació en 1511, en Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, William Clarke, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Frances Brook, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Alexander Alford aproximadamente 1538, en Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 30 de diciembre de 1577, en Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
